title: Cinematic and Web Funnel Engine — intake/raw-answers.json (Skill 62, U9)
description: Append-only transcript of every question actually put to the client and every value recorded for it (spec Section 8.2 intake/raw-answers.json), including dynamic per-claim truth-source follow-up questions and known-context confirmation questions. Written atomically after EVERY single answer (not just at lock time), so a crashed/interrupted intake session resumes exactly where it left off.
